description: Style Note Look cool and casual in this fashionable pair of jeans from flying machine. The well worn and well fitted look gives you unparalleled style. Team it with tees and canvas shoes for that chilled out and cool look.Product Details Washed blue jeans, has two insert pockets in front, has one coin pocket inside the right insert pocket, crumpled look below the insert pockets in the front, button and zipped closure, two pockets the back with stitched detailing, waistband with loops for the belt and a brand patch on the back of the waistband Material Care 71.1% cotton, 28.1% polyester and 0.8% spandex Machine wash cold Do not tumble dry Do not dry in direct sunlight Use warm iron, do not iron on print Size and Fit Skinny fit, low riseThe model (height 6'and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
